name: IsolationRequest
description: Request to isolate an endpoint or user from the Unisys Stealth zero trust network

fields.name: endpoint
fields.description: Fully Qualified Domain Name (FQDN) of the endpoint to isolate

fields.name: user
fields.description: Username to isolate from the Stealth network

fields.name: roleId
fields.description: Optional isolation role ID to apply during isolation
